notes: ManualsLib manual 3005287 explicitly covers the C9200L-24P-4G (not a different variant). USB console port is mini-Type B (connector mapped to usb-b as the closest schema value; not micro-B). Power inlet on the switch is IEC C14 male (accepts a C13 power cord), confirmed by the Cisco-branded CAB-AC-C9200L power cord (C13-to-NEMA-5-15P). The 4 uplink SFP ports are 1G fixed (not 10G). PoE+ budget is 370W standard, up to 740W with optional second PSU (PWR-C5-600WAC). Model is sold with -E (Network Essentials) or -A (Network Advantage) license suffix; base model number is C9200L-24P-4G.

ports.name: 10/100/1000 PoE+ Ethernet 1–24
ports.note: 24 downlink ports with full PoE+ (up to 30W per port)

ports.name: Management Ethernet
ports.note: Dedicated out-of-band management Gigabit Ethernet port

ports.name: RJ-45 Console
ports.note: Serial console port; requires RJ-45-to-DB-9 adapter cable for PC connection

ports.name: USB Console (mini-B)
ports.note: USB mini-Type B (5-pin) console port; requires USB-A to USB-mini-B cable. Not micro-B.

ports.name: USB Type A
ports.note: USB-A port for external flash storage; NOT a console port

ports.name: AC Power Inlet
ports.note: IEC C14 male inlet on the switch; accepts standard C13 power cord (e.g. CAB-AC-C9200L, C13-to-NEMA-5-15P). 100–240 VAC, 50–60 Hz.
